title: 6 lsof Commands for Finding Ports and File Locks
summary: See what is holding a port or file with lsof commands for process lookup, listening sockets, open directories, and per-process inspection.

test_environment.runtime: lsof available on the local system

verification_setup: Replace the example ports, process id, and paths before running the commands.
Use local processes or files you are allowed to inspect.
verification_command: Manual verification only; run the commands from src/lsof_commands_for_finding_ports_and_file_locks.sh against real local ports, paths, or processes.
verification_notes: Manual verification only. Run against local ports, paths, or processes you are allowed to inspect; results vary by privilege level.
